texto: Prison is a process, a succession of imprisonments. At first it operates only on a physical level, restricting your movement. Later, it extends to the psychological plane, encompassing your very perception. You come to exclude all thoughts, all visions of the free world.
explicacao: Citação de Norman Parker sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Prison is a process, a succession of imprisonments. At first it operates only on a physical level…” articula reflexao, prison, process em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
